words.def: something regarded as a normative example
words.zh: n. 常態, 標準, 正常, 普通

words.def: the temporary provision of money (usually at interest)
a human limb; technically the part of the superior limb between the shoulder and the elbow but commonly used to refer to the whole superior limb
words.zh: n. 手臂, 袖子, 狹長港灣, 武器

words.def: an adult person who is male (as opposed to a woman)
words.zh: n. 男人, 人類, 人

words.def: move fast by using one's feet, with one foot off the ground at any given time
